profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Victoria Care Indonesia Tbk manufactures and sells cosmetics and toiletries in Indonesia and internationally. It operates in three segments: Personal Care and Antiseptic, Hair Care, and Others. The Personal Care and Antiseptic segment offers skincare creams and lotions, makeup, and body care products, such as body scrubs, hand and body soaps, perfumes, and deodorants; and antiseptic products, including antiseptic liquids and gels, antiseptic soaps, cleaning fluids, disinfectant liquids and sprays, and other products. It also provides facial masks, facial cotton, eyebrow pencils, lip creams, serums, hand sanitizers, and mouthwash. The Hair Care segment offers shampoo, hair mask, hair coloring, hair curling, and straightening agents, as well as other products related to hair care and treatments. Its Others segment provides coffee beans and powder, souvenirs, and snacks. In addition, it engages in the wholesale trading of pharmaceutical and medical laboratory equipment. The company sells its products under the Miranda, Herborist, Victoria, Nuface, Creative Beauty Dazzle Professional, Secret Clean, Sixsence, and Bath & Buff brands. It exports its products to Japan, China, Korea, Malaysia, the Philippines, Brunei Darussalam, and Hong Kong. PT Victoria Care Indonesia Tbk was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
